problem_text_cn: 1444 用单摆精确测量重力加速度。[可供仪器和用具] 可调节摆长单摆实验仪，其中单摆上有米尺、小磁钢、霍耳开关传感器及计数计时仪（复旦天欣公司生产），作图纸 1 张、直尺 1 把，游标卡尺 1 把。[要求] (1) 用霍耳开关和计时仪测量单摆振动周期。(2) 已知单摆振动周期$T$与摆角$\theta$有关：$T = 2\pi\sqrt{\frac{L}{g}}\left[1 + \frac{1}{4}\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)\right]$，设计一种实验方法，能精确测量本地区的重力加速度$g$。
problem_text_en: 1444 Precisely measure gravitational acceleration with a simple pendulum. [Available instruments and tools] Adjustable length simple pendulum experimental instrument, including a meter stick on the simple pendulum, small magnetic steel, Hall switch sensor and counting timer (produced by Fudan Tianxin Company), 1 sheet of graph paper, 1 straightedge, 1 vernier caliper. [Requirements] (1) Use the Hall switch and timer to measure the vibration period of the simple pendulum. (2) It is known that the vibration period $T$ of the simple pendulum is related to the pendulum angle $\theta$: $T = 2\pi\sqrt{\frac{L}{g}}\left[1 + \frac{1}{4}\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)\right]$. Design an experimental method to accurately measure the gravitational acceleration $g$ in this area.
img_cn: 图1444_1：单摆精确测量重力加速度装置示意图
图1444_2：2T-sin²(θ/2) 测量数据及线性拟合结果
img_en: Fig. 1444_1: Schematic diagram of precise measurement of gravitational acceleration with simple pendulum
Fig. 1444_2: 2T-sin²(θ/2) measurement data and linear fitting results
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】考虑摆角修正$T = 2\pi\sqrt{\frac{L}{g}}\left[1 + \frac{1}{4}\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)\right]$，即$2T = 2T_0 + \frac{T_0}{2}\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)$（$T_0$为$\theta=0$时周期）。测不同摆幅$\theta_m$对应的$2T$，作$2T-\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta_m}{2}\right)$图，外推至$\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta_m}{2}\right)=0$得$T_0$，代入$T_0 = 2\pi\sqrt{\frac{L}{g}}$求$g$。代入数据：摆长$L = (57.20 \pm 0.05)\ \mathrm{cm}$，拟合得$T_0 = 1.5185\ \mathrm{s}$，$g = 9.794\ \mathrm{m/s^2}$，与上海地区$g = 9.79407\ \mathrm{m/s^2}$误差极小。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Consider the pendulum angle correction $T = 2\pi\sqrt{\frac{L}{g}}\left[1 + \frac{1}{4}\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)\right]$, i.e., $2T = 2T_0 + \frac{T_0}{2}\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)$ ($T_0$ is the period when $\theta=0$). Measure $2T$ corresponding to different amplitudes $\theta_m$, plot $2T-\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta_m}{2}\right)$ graph, extrapolate to $\sin^2\left(\frac{\theta_m}{2}\right)=0$ to get $T_0$, substitute into $T_0 = 2\pi\sqrt{\frac{L}{g}}$ to find $g$. Substituting data: pendulum length $L = (57.20 \pm 0.05)\ \mathrm{cm}$, fitting gives $T_0 = 1.5185\ \mathrm{s}$, $g = 9.794\ \mathrm{m/s^2}$, with minimal error from Shanghai area $g = 9.79407\ \mathrm{m/s^2}$.
problem_answer: 重力加速度：$\boldsymbol{9.794\ \mathrm{m/s^2}}$；测量关键：外推法求$\theta=0$时周期$T_0$，消除摆角影响。
